title: opendownstream-pr.yml: render breaklines correctly
body: Fix rendering breaklines in github PR description.

comments.body:
> Reading https://yaml.org/spec/1.2.2/#731-double-quoted-style , we might need one more empty line between paragraphs

I was wrong, https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6445#issue-3538043531 looks perfect.
